name: GitHub repositories should require pull request review before merge
description: Repositories where the default branch does not require pull request review
body:
### Security intent

This control flags repositories where Cyscale did not observe a pull request review requirement on the default branch.

### Assessment context

Pull request review gives teams a control point for code quality, security review, and change accountability.
remediationDescription:
## Remediation

Update the default branch protection rule or repository ruleset to require pull request reviews before merge.
